title: WWE Elite IRS (Irwin R. Schyster)
subtitle: Loose with Briefcase — The Taxman Cometh
description:
The Money Man himself, Irwin R. Schyster. Mattel WWE Elite Collection release with his signature look: crisp white shirt, red tie, red suspenders, black slacks, and the silver tax-collector briefcase accessory. Everybody's gotta pay their taxes.

Loose figure, displayed only. Paint is clean, articulation is tight, briefcase included. No yellowing, no broken joints, no missing pieces.

Ships in a bubble mailer with protective wrap. Message with questions or for additional photos.
condition: Loose — Complete with briefcase, excellent paint
